annotations.description: DISPLAY ONLY. Review state shown to the steward on the entry. The wrapper's gate NEVER reads this aspect — the only gate is the `verification` aspect's source_tier.
Which dimension(s) drifted (e.g. ["semantic"]). Mirrors the verification aspect's drift_summary, for display.
Advisory triage output (cosmetic | substantive). ADVISORY ONLY — never a verdict; it does not affect what the wrapper delivers.
One-sentence advisory reasoning from the triage.
Advisory next-step from the triage (e.g. one-click re-approve | review carefully).
When drift was detected (mirrors the verification aspect's drift_detected_at).
